original_image_tags: A faint, backward stamp is visible through the paper, reading "McCHORD FIELD FLIGHT SERVICE CENTER PF 14 Jul 3 '85 JF".

elements.description: Two black circular hole-punch marks at the top of the page. The word 'RESTRICTED' is typed at the top center and bottom center of the page. A faint, reversed ink stamp reading 'McCHORD FIELD FLIGHT SERVICE CENTER' and 'Jul 29 '49' is visible in the lower right section.

judge.reason: The descriptions quote the same stamp but give different dates ('14 Jul 3 '85' vs 'Jul 29 '49'), which is a direct contradiction on specific verbatim text.
